title: EzChat (AutoGG)
description: Highly customizable AutoMessage. Supports custom messages. Detects totem pops and deaths.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/642bf55322bc3d410676182a579f858045b17a69.png)

# What does this mod do?
- This mod automatically sends messages when someone pops a totem or dies near you.
- You can adjust the tracking distance (in blocks) using the Detection Radius slider in the configuration menu.

# Installation
- Requirements: **Fabric Loader, Mod Menu, Cloth Config API, Fabric API**.
- This is a client-side mod, since messages are sent from you to chat.

# Config
- You can open the config via either Mod Menu or the /ezchat command.
- You can customize messages with text fields.
- You can add multiple text fields. A message will be selected randomly.
- Text fields support placeholders: **[pops]** for pop count, **[name]** for target player's name.

![Basic configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a9699c1f51b720dbc7c88f359425d5115a7b7e.jpeg)
